# Project Instructions

This is a long paragraph of instructions for the coding agent that is meant to simulate a bloated global agent context. It explains all the coding conventions, the style guide, the test strategy, the list of preferred libraries, the branching policy, and dozens of other rules that the agent is expected to follow at all times. None of this needs to be in the default context on every single request.
